name: PubNative
description: In-app marketplace and monetization SDK (HyBid) for mobile publishers, part of Verve Groups Performance+ Marketplace.

seo.title: PubNative — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: PubNative: In-app marketplace and monetization SDK (HyBid) for mobile publishers, part of Verve Groups Performance+ Marketplace.

when_to_use: In-app monetization via HyBid SDK for mobile publishers
Parallel bidding setup for Android and iOS game monetization
Accessing Verve Group DSP demand via PubNative marketplace

pros: HyBid SDK is lightweight for integration
Part of Verve Group's Performance+ demand
cons: Smaller than tier-1 SSPs on direct demand
Brand visibility lower than MAX or LevelPlay
Verve ecosystem rebrand still in progress
review.verdict: Developer-friendly in-app marketplace, strong inside Verve's ecosystem, narrower standalone appeal.
review.best_for: Mobile publishers already using Verve products or seeking a lightweight in-app SSP.
review.not_for: Publishers who need maximum demand breadth and tier-1 SSP brand recognition.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
